name: Banana Mallow Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the vanilla wafers and melted butter into a 9-inch pie plate. Bake at 375°F for 8 minutes.
2. Prepare the vanilla pudding using 1 3/4 cups of milk. Cover the surface with transparent wrap and chill.
3. Fold in the mini-marshmallows and Cool Whip into the chilled pudding mixture.
4. Slice the bananas and arrange them over the crust.
5. Pour the pudding mixture over the bananas.
6. Chill several hours or overnight before serving.
